name: Frozen Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: Chocolate crumb pie crust, 9 inch (9 to 10)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk and peanut butter until smooth.
3. Stir in lemon juice and vanilla extract.
4. Fold in whipped cream.
5. Pour into prepared pie crust.
6. Drizzle with hot fudge topping.
7. Freeze for 4 hours or until firm.
8. Store leftovers in the freezer.
